evidence-binding: n1-branch-commit-fix cdaec2f007d9
role: tdd-guide
node: n1-branch-commit-fix (issue-715, plan epoch 2)
fix_target: F1 of kaola-workflow/issue-715/.cache/epochs/1/files/.cache/n4-falsify-residue-fixes.md (triggers A + B)

disclosure_field: discard_archive_branch
(one explicit field on the emitted JSON — release top level AND watch-pr cleanup entry — disclosing
which branch received, or did not receive, the discard-archive commit; present on BOTH success and
skip. n2 mirrors this name.)

RED: scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js --only testReleaseInPlaceOnFeatureBranchCommitsArchiveOnBase — AssertionError: "#715 F1: release on the feature branch must restore the base checkout, got HEAD=workflow/issue-801" with emitted JSON {"released":true,...,"discard_archive_committed":true,"restore_note":"tree dirty while on feature branch; skipped base restore + branch delete"} — the archive commit bound to the DISCARDED feature branch (F1 trigger A reproduced on the real candidate); scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js --only testWatchPrClosedSweepSkipsCommitOffBaseBranch — AssertionError: "#715 F1: an off-base sweep must truthfully report discard_archive_committed:false, got: {...\"discard_archive_committed\":true...}" — the CLOSED sweep committed onto unrelated branch workflow/other-lane with NO branch disclosure (F1 trigger B reproduced); node scripts/test-claim-hardening.js — 4 failures / 450 passed: "FAIL: #715 F1: treeDirty must be exported from claim.js for the restore-gate pin", "FAIL: #715 F1 restore-gate pin body skipped (treeDirty not exported)", "FAIL: #715 F1: commitDiscardArchive must be exported from claim.js for the base-guard pin", "FAIL: #715 F1 helper pin body skipped (commitDiscardArchive not exported)" (pre-impl)
GREEN: both RED scenarios now pass as part of the FULL suite — `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` → "Workflow walkthrough simulation passed" (exit 0; includes testReleaseInPlaceOnFeatureBranchCommitsArchiveOnBase: restore proceeds, HEAD=main, feature branch deleted, discard_archive_committed:true + discard_archive_branch:"main", archive tree at main:<rel>, zero .discarded- residue, commit reachable from main; and testWatchPrClosedSweepSkipsCommitOffBaseBranch: committed:false + discard_archive_branch:"workflow/other-lane", both ref tips unchanged, residue recoverable on disk); `node scripts/test-claim-hardening.js` → "claim-hardening tests passed (464 assertions)" (450 pre-existing + 14 new #715 F1 pins: exact-dest exemption/sibling-blocks/look-alike-not-exempt + helper refuses off-base with disclosure/commits on-base with disclosure). Full gate also green: test-sink-merge.js (105 assertions), test-bundle-finalize.js (149 tests), validate-script-sync.js (OK), edition-sync.js --check (parity), plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/test-gitlab-sinks.js, plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/test-gitea-sinks.js, test-kimi-edition.js (577 assertions), test-opencode-edition.js (547 assertions) — all pass.

fix_summary: treeDirty gained an optional exemptRelPaths parameter (segment-boundary exact match; -uall enumeration only when an exemption is in play so a collapsed untracked tree can neither hide the dest nor mask a foreign sibling; isParkedLanePath untouched — archive/* stays never-parked). cmdRelease exempts ONLY the ACTUAL result.dest from the restore gate and passes releaseBaseBranch (savedBaseBranch || defaultBranch) to the helper; commitDiscardArchive now resolves the current branch from the dest's own toplevel and refuses to stage unless it equals the surviving base (defense in depth — both call sites inherit), returning { committed, branch, detail? } on every path; cmdWatchPr CLOSED sweep reads base_branch BEFORE the archive move and passes it in; both emit sites disclose discard_archive_branch on success AND skip. Epoch-1 semantics kept: never throws past the emit, diff-quiet guard skips redundant commits truthfully, pathspec-scoped add/commit of the ACTUAL dest only, OFFLINE never skips a commit that does run. Propagation: plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js byte-identical twin (cp, diff empty); gitlab/gitea ports hand-mirrored (helper byte-identical to canonical; treeDirty executable body identical, ports keep their terser comment style; watch-mr/closed nouns adjusted).
